html:
Exclusive to:

The Sterling Trough Deli is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Food items to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, The Sterling Trough Deli also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, a Honey Ham and four Pig Skins.

During Pig Fiesta, It will have re-skinned food, though the food maintains the same values.

Interior

Upon entering The Sterling Trough Deli, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Storeowner Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Dragonpie 30
Honey Ham 20
Meatballs 10
Pierogi 10
Turkey Dinner 10
Waffles 10
Froggle Bunwich 5
Honey Nuggets 5
Stuffed Eggplant 4
Pumpkin Cookies 3
Ratatouille 3
Monster Lasagna 2

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Egg 1 2
Fish Morsel 1 2
Frog Legs 1 2

Decor

  • Meatrack
  • Wire Basket Decor
  • Sacle
  • Oven
  • Wall Defect

Shelfs

  • Fridge

Pillar

  • Planed Wood Column Corner
  • Planed Wood Column Front

Window

  • Round Burlap Window

Doors

  • Exit

Gallery

  • The interior of The Sterling Trough Deli.

–Wheeler

'''The Sterling Trough Deli''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Food]] items to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], The Sterling Trough Deli also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], a [[Honey Ham]] and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

During [[Pig Fiesta]], It will have re-skinned food, though the food maintains the same values.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering The Sterling Trough Deli, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Storeowner Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.
